command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat > /home/jose/.openclaw/workspace/MEMORY.md << 'MEMEOF'
# MEMORY.md - What You Remember

_This is your persistent memory across sessions. Read it at the start of every conversation. Update it as you learn things worth keeping._

## About Jose

- Runs an embroidery business called DevilDollz (cutegrafiks.com)
- Based in Bellmawr, New Jersey (America/New_York timezone)
- First contact via WhatsApp on 2026-05-30
- Uses Windows 11 desktop (192.168.0.39) as primary machine
- Communicates via WhatsApp (+12012201919)

## Homelab

- Dell PowerEdge R730xd running VMware ESXi 7.0
- All VMs on 192.168.0.x subnet, Debian 13 Trixie, user: jose
- Key VMs: vm-claude-hub (.191), vm-nextcloud (.198), vm-openclaw (.199), vm-dashboard (.201)
- Desktop Ollama at http://192.168.0.39:11434

## Preferences

- Direct and to the point — no filler phrases
- Prefers concise answers over lengthy explanations
- Interested in AI image generation, LoRA training, ComfyUI
- Interests: comic book art, X-Men, Red Sonja, Elektra, Supergirl

## Session Notes

_(Add notes here as you learn things across sessions.)_

---

_Update this file whenever you learn something worth remembering. This is how you persist._
MEMEOF
echo done"
